queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account influences credit default probability and serves as a risk mitigation factor in consumer lending.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Determinants of default associated with loan purposes for used vehicle purchases and their empirical impact on reducing credit risk profiles.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers related to the absence of documented savings accounts and their correlation with lower default rates in retail credit portfolios.
